idea.title: Varnish Restore
idea.hook: Rub yellow varnish off a daily oil painting without scrubbing through the fragile paint beneath.
idea.prototype: Drag to rub varnish off a tile-grid painting; over-rub a fragile tile and you chip the paint. Win at 90% varnish removed with <5 chips. Solvent reservoir caps action density.
idea.mutation_of: Clean Sweep (cleaning loop), with restraint pressure
idea.why_novel: Drag-stroke with chip-budget restraint is mechanically distinct from collide-clean (Clean Sweep / Apartment Cleaner). Solvent reservoir adds a second resource axis.
idea.lose_condition: Five paint chips accumulated before varnish coverage drops below 10%

sources.title: satisfying-clearing signal
sources.snippet: Cleanup/clearing loops continue to hit ASMR/relaxation aesthetics; restraint pressure is the missing differentiator.

sources.title: art-restoration theme
sources.snippet: Art restoration is universally readable and language-free; supports tier-1 global hook signal.

sources.title: daily-seed hook
sources.snippet: Daily seeds drive return visits and shareable share-strings.

synthesizer_brief: Cleaning loop with restraint pressure — chip-budget + solvent reservoir adds a second axis beyond pure scrub-to-clear
